case_title: SUNRISE MIDDLE EASTERN DELI, INC. VS. FRANCISCO JAVIER LOPEZ

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ENVELOPED MARKED RETURN TO SENDER-NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED UNABLE TO FORWARD COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, FRANCISCO JAVIER

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,195.00 FILED BY SUNRISE MIDDLE EASTERN DELI, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, FRANCISCO JAVIER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-18-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-18-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-18-2014 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
RETURN OF SMALL CLAIMS "CONTINUE ORDER". SENT TO: PLAINTIFF. RESENT TO CORRECTED ADDRESS.
